features: 【Rainbow Unicorn Birthday Decorations】Our kid tattoos temporary is hand drawn designs featuring flower,heart,rainbow,cloud,smile face,sun,star,wings,cupcake,bow,crown,diamond and more! Each tattoo is infused with glitter to make you shine

【Large Quantity Kids Temporary Tattoo】4 sheets of more than 100 glittery styles rainbow unicorn tattoos temporary for kids! Each sheet measures 21*15cm,can be applied to arm,hand,finger,leg,feet,neck,chest and smooth surfaces like plates, glasses and cups

【Long Lasting Tattoo Stickers】Rainbow unicorn glitter tattoo for kids are made with safe materials that are waterproof and non-allergic. They can last for 3-5 days. You don't have to worry about bathing, swimming or getting wet! Perfect for party decor

【Best Choices for Party&Gifts】These glitter unicorn tattoos for kids are realistic, waterproof temporary tattoos for kids make great gifts for different occasions such as parties, birthdays, school activities, holidays, Christmas, Easter, and Halloween
【Easy to Apply】You can do it in 20 seconds! Stick it, wet it, peel it, rock it! And it is easily clear off by rubbing with alcohol or body oil
